name: chain__dude_in_a_telegram_group_said_he_makes_
method: dude in a telegram group said he makes money "rating products"thought he meant like amazon reviews or some scam shitnope$17k last month"rating products?""i buy digital products in my niche. review th

stages.task: Scrape 20-50 products per niche from app stores, PH, Gumroad, G2
Score each product on 8 dimensions (price, features, UX, support, updates, integrations, value, uniqueness) using Claude
Generate ranked guide with comparison tables, verdict, and affiliate links where available
Build landing page, deploy, create Stripe product, add to distribution queue
